name: Grilled Vegetable Soup (from My Garden)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill all vegetables except garlic.
2. In a food processor, place the remaining ingredients (except 1/2 cup of vegetables) and process until smooth.
3. Season with salt, pepper, lemon juice, and chopped rosemary.
4. Dice the remaining 1/2 cup of vegetables.
5. Serve hot or cold, sprinkling the diced vegetables on top.
